provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, massively muscular human male space marine in gleaming silver power armor with a flowing cape and dramatic backlighting, standing in a powerful wide-legged heroic pose with a giant energy sword, the armor is ornate with eagle motifs and skulls and decorative scrollwork, not a scratch or dent anywhere, the cape billows in a wind that does not exist on a spaceship, everything about this screams main character in a power fantasy not a working person
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Same power fantasy armor. Too heroic, too clean, too ornate.
